entry.title: Adding Hyper link in ALV
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I'm trying to add Hyperlink in my ALV display Through which I can Directly access a specific line no of a report.

Is it Possible or not If  please tell How??

entry.title: Re: ABSENCE QUOTA CARRY OVER
entry.content:
On Day 31 of Month 12, what is the value of Time Type ZQEC? Does it show in your Time Evaluation Results Tables?

Also, in PCR ZQEU, on Day 1 of Month 1, try to add the value of Last ZQEC without overwriting it's existing value.

entry.title: Re: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameter...
entry.content:
Hello,

Did you filter the query with your parameter?

You should have something like this :

Best.

entry.title: Integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys through SAP Integration Suite to transmit contacts
entry.content:
Hello community,

I’m new to the SAP Community and would like to ask you about SAP Integration Suite.

I’ve been reading this use case:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/integrate-qualtrics-surveys-directly-with-sap-emarsys-engagement-platform/ba-p/13552484,
and it’s very similar to what we need to implement.

We need to integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys to sync contacts between both platforms, and we’re considering acquiring SAP Integration Suite.

Could you help me understand what happens “inside” the platform — how it connects both systems and handles the integration?
Also, would you happen to know who I can contact to get pricing information for this product?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition / Worklist for exchange rate maintenance
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition I do not find an app for maintaining exchange rates based on a worklist as it was possible with transaction S_B20_88000153. 
How can this feature be supported?

entry.title: Re: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameter...
entry.content: Ok. So, I created the two Parameters, then I should create the formula to check the entered value, is that correct ?

entry.title: Re: Document Currency is not changing at invoice level
entry.content: Have you checked the rules for copy control defined in the VTFL/VTFA customising transactions for the invoice and its previous document types?

entry.title: Re: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameter...
entry.content: And the field I should compare to is the Date field saved in the DB.

entry.title: Re: Down payment in sales order
entry.content:
Thanks for your input.

I was able to able a billing plan type to my sales document type. However here, i have a net value of 0. Why is that? 

This is my sales order at header level:

How does the net value of the header billing plan work?

Thanks

entry.title: Dump issue with MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have created RAP class method which will be called during Sales order creation using entity I_SalesOrderTP.
Method is declared FOR ENTITY EVENT salesorder~created and sales order line item field rejection reason is updated using MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
IN LOCAL MODE ENTITY salesorderitem
UPDATE FROM lt_update ( sales line item filled with rejection reason field)
FAILED ls_failed

The above modify statement causes dump 'The ASSERT condition was violated'. Could you please let us know if MODIFY ENTITIES can be used for 'ENTITY EVENT salesorder~created' Please provide solution to update sales order line item field with values during sales order creation.

Thanks & Regards,
Rajeswari

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content: try clicking the unlock button in S_ATO_SETUP

entry.title: Re: Document Currency is not changing at invoice level

entry.title: Re: Can I create a dimension with latitude and longitude...
entry.content:
@PM8 

Latitude and Longitude are created as attributes of the geographic/location dimension. Its not the other way round.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Manage System Hibernation

Hi

Thanks for the very helpful post!

My ABAP system is stopped and button Start is disabled? 

Has anyone faced such an issue? How to fix it and start the system?

Best Regards

Nadia

entry.title: Custom recording dictionary adding extra blank space
entry.content:
This is something I've been experiencing for a while now.

I've created a custom recording dictionary which I use for almost all SEN projects. For whatever reason, I always get an extra blank space after calling the value for the input text. My dictionary entries are all clean and don't have any extra white space anywhere.

Looking at the HTML for this, it seems to add this space on its own right before the closing SPAN tag (<span style="font-weight: bold;"> $#{text_d} </span>.</p>) .

Any suggestions as to how I can fix this?

entry.title: Re: Can I create a dimension with latitude and longitude...
entry.content: @N1kh1l , that right. Sorry I missed that.

entry.title: Re: how to use toggle button in each row?
entry.content: I want comment in objecttable in each cell and comment should input of user . I am using sap btp sdk for android

entry.title: Need help with figuring out technical name for "As of Date"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

We are trying to create a new report in SQ01. Customer has requested to add "As of Date" field as a selection category. We tried to find the technical name but failed. Can someone please let us know under which Table name and Technical name for "As of Date" comes. 

We tried with F1 - technical information but still no correct answers. It shows ZFBDT as technical name in table BSEG but when checked in SE16N it shows the Baseline date as ZFBDT. What are we missing here. 

Product Version: EHP8 - SAP ECC 6.0

entry.title: Re: Cannot convert data type from CHAR20 to INT8 in CDS v...
entry.content:
BufferDays shows 4 different values: 0,1,2 and initial. The initial value needs to be treated separately, it cannot be casted to INT8. Therefore, try the following statement:

case when _YY1_SCM_CBO_MABD_WINDOW.BufferDays is initial then 0
  else cast( _YY1_SCM_CBO_MABD_WINDOW.BufferDays as ABAP.INT8 )
end

entry.title: Re: How to transfer BRF+ value in TCCS
entry.content: I have same issue. I created a condition TCM_AMNTFR with BRF+ Expression. But there is only data access definition inside the condtion. there is no chance to maintain the expression. Totally confused...Note given above is not explaining the concept . Can any one help to explain how BRF+ gets assigned to condition type/condition?

entry.title: Re: Can we control Custom Logic code using Sy-Tcode or Ap...
entry.content: No, in S4hana Public cloud , in my case we just have Key user extensibility and here Sy-TCODE doesnt supports.

entry.title: Re: New Z field in TU transaction

entry.title: Issue with Fiscal Week Configuration in SAC Planning Model
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on creating a Date dimension in a planning model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

I've successfully configured the fiscal year to start in May and to be labeled by the year in which it ends.

However, I need the fiscal week to start from the first Thursday of each month. Currently, the dropdown only allows selecting Saturday, Sunday, or Monday as the week start day.

Could anyone advise on how to achieve this or suggest a workaround?

Thanks in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand RISE with SAP

entry.title: Re: Issue with Data Types: Batch Load Data into a Custom...
entry.content:
in such cases , you need to check your WSDl file and try to see the complete format over there for that particular fields like- 

<Property Name="BufferDays" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="20" sap:label="Buffer Days"

Therefore you need to convert/format your field in excel like wise and you are good to go.

entry.title: Re: Enabling Multiline Editing Capabalities in RAP
entry.content:
Hello,
Did you work with odata v2 or v4 as on data v2 there is no create button at the composition level ??

entry.title: Re: Recap Series: SAP Community members speaking at SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
@moshenaveh for SIT session recaps I usually base the blog on the YouTube recording. In those cases AI helps me put together something more technical about documenting the session and linking to the full video, not adding much of a personal voice.

But for personal blogs, your tip about training the model with old posts works. I’ve done that before. What I like most is recording my thoughts in MS Word using voice. I use some blog key points to guide the AI and always ask it to keep my tone. That’s what helps make the blog feel more like me. Appreciate the ideas, thanks!

entry.title: Re: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content:
You may write below syntax within your custom logic code :

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'Pass8' ).

Here instead of PASS8 - you may add your internal variables as well. Above syntax would ensure you if the code is triggered and you may see this variable in CUSTOM LOGIC TRACING app.

entry.title: Re: Tax procedure in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content: Were you able to get answer from this? I am also looking for the same. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content: Hola, buen día me está pasando lo mismo.

entry.title: Using the BPML in a Cloud ALM Project Set up for transport management
entry.content:
We are a government that has just started on our SAP Cloud ALM journey. The first phase of our project is to replace STMS and use Cloud ALM to do all our transports to our S/4HANA Private Cloud environment. I am after some advice on how to set up Projects within Cloud ALM using the BPML either as separate projects, the use of workstreams or tags.

I want know if other SAP customers have used the BPML structure to set up Cloud ALM Projects and if they have come across any issues during the set up or any issues after they have set it up so that we don't fall into the same trap.

I'm happy to arrange a meeting to discuss or use the blog for some advice.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content: Hola, me está sucediendo lo mismo. Intenté todo lo que dicen, inclusive reiniciar el router de inetrnet, conectarme desde otra red, a través de otro navegador y nada. Por favor, si pueden brindarme otra solución, lo agradecería. GRACIAS!!!

entry.title: PowerDesigner 16.6 SP06 X64 dependencies on Microsoft Visual C++ 2010
entry.content:
Hello,

Is Power Designer 16.6 SP06 X64 16.6.6.5645 dependencies there on  Microsoft Visual C++ 2010 ?
Is it is advised to update to latest version of Microsoft VC++ Redistributable for win 11?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner 16.6 SP06 X64 dependencies on Microsoft...
entry.content:
Hello,

PD 16.6 and PD 16.7 versions prior to 16.7 SP08 require specific frameworks, including the mandatory Microsoft Visual C++ 2010, which cannot be replaced or removed.
However, PD 16.7 SP08 requires the Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 runtime libraries.
This information is also available in KBA 3483140 - Which Visual C++ runtime libraries does PowerDesigner require?

Please note that PD 16.6 has reached its end of life in November 2021.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Need help with figuring out technical name for "As of...
entry.content:
(I suppose you are working on FI item reports)

As far as I know, there is no field of this type in the FI database. The user can refer to the parameter present in the initial screens of the finance detail reports (FBLxN, FAGLL0x).

  • The item is cleared if it is cleared nowadays and the reference date is at least equal to the clearing date?
  • If not, the user should be contacted again to clarify their requirements.

entry.title: Re: Recap Series: SAP Community members speaking at SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
@Marssel700 Very cool idea to record on MS word!

Happy to support presenters to combine between the personal insights and AI tools when posting about their sessions. 

You can also ask it to embed SEO keywords according to target audience, which is very interesting as well.

entry.title: Re: Develop Powerful Analytical Queries using ABAP Core Data Services (CDS)
entry.content:
I am deep diving and testing the behavior of queries defined with "transient view entity" statement.

A thing that I notice is that when I consume attributes from am associated #DIMENSION, the execution behaviour for me is not good:

1) Application server (AS) reads from the #CUBE view with aggregation (group by).

2) Application server issues a FDA Write to the database putting every attribute ID to join with master data of the #DIMENSION view.

3) the join with fact is effectively done in AS !!!

I try to apply this annotation @analytics.settings.olapPushdown: #MAX

and I notice the correct change in RSRT in query properties.

But with trace ST05 I keep getting the "FDA Write" behaviour.

How can I control this? is this a limit of transient provider?

Thanks,
Alberto

entry.content: We are facing same error, did you find any solution ?

entry.title: Run as installation issue for SAPGUI / registry management
entry.content:
Hello

As I'm not the administrator of my workstation, I install the SAPGUI package I created with NwSapSetupAdmin via the "Run as" command, but the registries entries I've created only apply to the account that has administrative rights. How can I make the registry keys I've defined apply to the end user?

Thank you for your help

Eric

Vasso

entry.title: Re: Error while deploying SAPUI5 app via visual studio co...
entry.content: Even after adding deployment configuration from application wizard via which we create SAPUI5 app file of ui5-deploy.yaml was not added to my project. So via Fiori:Add Deployment Configuration generator i have added the deployment configuration then ui5-deploy.yaml file was available in my sapui5 app in visual studio then by using both build and deploy command i was able to upload the app to onpremise server.

entry.title: S/4 Hana conversion to margin analysis
entry.content:
Hi:

We upgraded from ECC 6.0 to S/4 Hana 2022 (on Rise) in August of 2023.  Our upgrade was just a technical upgrade, no new functionality.  We had/have costing based COPA active and want to look at turning on margin analysis now.  I am looking for any information from those who have made this conversion already.  We are trying to determine level of effort and what it will take to complete all the necessary evaluations. In my searching - I found documentation for those doing this as part of your S/4 migration but am not finding much on doing it stand alone after migration.

I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Re: ABAP: Installation Guide
entry.content: All these ones: https://www.google.com/search?q=blog+post+ABAP+Trial+site%3Asap.com

entry.title: Delivery manual attachment is saving as .txt instead of .pdf (archived document are okay) in WebGui
entry.content:
Hello,

My delivery has two attachment, one created by an output in archive mode ("Bon de livraison"). Other one, i added myself with VL02N, it's a classic PDF file ("croix").

When with webgui I try to display them, both looks like same.

But then I try to save them, "Bon de livraison" let me save in pdf format whereas "croix" save a txt file.

I found this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2404718 but i dont want to prevent display pdf in browser given that it works for "Bon de livraison".

If you have any idea why behaviour differs.

Thanks, and best regards.

entry.title: Re: S/4 Hana conversion to margin analysis
entry.content:
Hi @kdudgmo1023 

You can refer to the below blog for step by step guide from migration from costing based COPA to Account based COPA. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blog-posts-by-members/steps-by-step-guide-migration-from-costing-based-copa-to-account-based-copa/ba-p/14090125

Also I have one question, as you mentioned you are already migrated to S4 HANA, how come you have not activated Account based COPA as its mandatory in S4 HANA. 

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: Dunning in Fiori
entry.content:
@Bohdan 
Hi Bohdan,
Thank you for sharing the article, according to your article, I did realize, by the way, have you tested using BRF + with Email Template to send emails? When I tested it, the PDF can be generated normally, but when I press F3, it doesn't trigger the event response.😁

entry.title: 2025 WBS Settlement to Assets is failing for Down payments
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

We are experiencing an issue during the settlements from Wbs to Assets.

Our Projects have a structure that allows the Asset be object receiver only in settlement rule for 2nd level wbs element. So whatever is posted in wbs from level 3 to higher is rolled up to level 2. Anyway the Down Payment assigned to level 3,4 or 5 and then rolled up to level 2 cannot be settled to Assets.

Questions:

Is this a SAP Standard depending on GL automating determination during settlements? Is that a SAP Standard Solution to this scenario in SAP ECC or SAP S/4HANA?  

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: 🇺🇸 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Houston, TX, USA)
entry.content: Thank you for confirming Thomas.

I’m trying to understand how the Loading Date is calculated in SAP during sales order processing. And the field is available in VBEP table.

Could someone please explain

Best regards,

Bharath

entry.title: Manager (DACS) cannot manage the global assignment of his employee (DAZO)
entry.content:
Note: he can "ADD" a global assignment. But once added, he cannot manage it. This is strange.
What would happen if we also grant edit possibilities to the (local) HR Administrator role?

FYI:

1. Without adding in a target group, manager has to manage his employee's global assignment. Is there any way that we can add it from permissions....!

2. Also Is there a way we can create a dynamic group based upon the field "Is On Global Assignment"?

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (64-bit) ErrorLicence Control Center Acces The License
entry.content:
Buenos días con todos, tengo el siguiente problema con mi servidor:
1)Se actualizo el windows server 2022 Standar y con sql 2019 standar con las ultimas actualizaciones de windows, resulta que luego le di una reinicia, anteriormente todo me cargaba muy bien luego que se actualizo y lo reinicie al momento de ingresar a SAP con mis credenciales manager ya no pude intregarme sale el siguiente mensaje "Unable to get access token. Contact Administrator." 

2) Intente ingresar al Service manager para ingresar mis servicios mediante el navegador chome u otros con mi usuario B1SiteUser, pero me sale el mensaje de: 

No se puede conectar a la URL de descubrimiento del servicio de autenticación
https://Serversap24:40020/auth/realms/sapb1/.well-known/openid-configuration . Para
más información, consulte la nota SAP 3237004.
Es muy probable que la dirección del servidor de autenticación no sea accesible o que haya un problema con el certificado.
¿Desea consultar esta página en una nueva versión de Windows?

3) Desinstale las últimas actualizaciones de Windows pero el problema persiste.

4) ingrese a los servicios de windows y reinicie los servicios de SAP pero el problema persiste

 

Si cuentan con la solución de este problema, les agradeceremos dejarlo por este medio o adjuntarme alguna documentación.

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone: Task Center: Server returned HTTP respo...
entry.content: Hi, where would you go an "Uncheck option System Certificate for Logon"

entry.title: Re: This is regarding Poland e-invoicing, Is there any fi...
entry.content:
Greetings,

Pls check note - 3346323 - eDocument Poland B2B(KSeF) Troubleshooting Guide

Table EDOPLINV stores the KSeF related fields(Session Valid Upto, KSeF Reference No, Aquisition Timestamp etc.)

entry.title: Ariba : VIM Invoice attachment is not showing in /n/opt/vim_va2 tcode
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a issue related to Invoice.Where the Invoice attachemnt is not seen in the VIM analytic report

Steps:

1) Invoice is created for a Indirect PO from SBN

2) It is transferred through IDOC to SAP VIM Document type (InvoiceExportDirect)

When I check the VIM-tcode (/n/opt/vim_va2) the attachment is not showing Invoice(screenshot) for Indirect PO. However, for the direct PO it is getting displayed

Any idea what could be the reason?

IDOC:

 

VIM Analytics: Indirect PO [ Issue record]

 

 

 

VIM Analytics: Direct PO

entry.title: Document xxxxxx does not exist - Intercompany sales - RD04
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing the Intercompany Sales process. Most of the flow is working as expected, but we’re encountering an issue during the creation of the AP invoice from message type RD04.

Although the IDoc is being generated, it fails with the error: "Document xxxxxx does not exist." The value "xxxxxx" is being pulled from the PO Number field in the sales order. However, in our process, no purchase order is being created in MM.

Here’s a brief overview of the steps we’re following:

  1. Sales order

  2. Delivery

  3. End customer invoice

  4. Intercompany invoice – RD04 – IDoc triggered to post vendor invoice

Since there is no MM purchase order in this flow, we’re unsure what the RD04-generated IDoc is supposed to match against on the MM side.

We would appreciate any insights or experiences from others who have implemented Intercompany Sales (not just standard Intercompany flow) and have successfully posted the vendor invoice without a corresponding PO.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Configure a tile on SAP Build Work Zone to manage Decision artifacts
entry.content:
@spatil_cengage no I don't see the app yet in the HTML5 repository

I already have a service instance configured in my CF space for SAP Build Process Automation with a service key

my BTP destination sap_process_automation_service_user_access is referring to this key with the html5-apps-repo / app_host_id

if I create a new service key for my SPA service instance, I will have a new html5-apps-repo / app_host_id, but just 1, there is always 1 app_host_id in the service key

are you saying that I should this new service key instead of my previous one and update my BTP destination with the new app_host_id?

entry.title: Re: How to extend fields for PO Mass upload template ?
entry.content:
Hello @Li_Grace 

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, if you’re using the Migrate Your Data app or an RPA bot to upload Purchase Orders in bulk, adding new fields like Storage Location to the Excel template isn’t straightforward. You can only use the fields that SAP has already made available in the template.

Follow the steps below,

Check if the Field is Supported

  • First, verify whether Storage Location (LGORT) is part of the standard migration template for Purchase Order Items.
  • Use the app, Migrate Your Data – Migration Cockpit
  • In the template, open the sheet Field List → search under PurchaseOrderItem to see if Storage Location is available.

 If it's listed there,
You can add it to the Excel sheet (PurchaseOrderItem tab) and fill it in — the system will process it during upload.

 If it's not listed,
The field is not supported in the standard migration object and cannot be added manually to the template. You’ll need a workaround (see below).

 Workaround Options

1st option, Post-Processing Update via API or Mass Change App

  • Upload POs with available fields
  • Use Mass Changes to Purchase Orders app or API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV to update the storage location afterwards.

2nd option, BTP RPA/Script Extension

If you're using SAP RPA

  • Extend your bot to update the storage location after creation using the Change Purchase Order app or API.

SAP officially recommends using

  • Mass Changes to Purchase Orders” Fiori app or
  • API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV
    ...to update or maintain fields like Storage Location if they’re not part of the initial upload.

 SAP References:

  • SAP Help: Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit and Mass Changes to Purchase Orders
  • Check also the migration object documentation in the Fiori app for the list of supported fields.

Hope it helps!

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Document xxxxxx does not exist - Intercompany sales - RD04

entry.title: HTTP Content Server all communication via SAP server?
entry.content:
Hi, 

we have a 3rd party ArchiveLink HTTP Content Server.

Create and Get request arrive at the HTTP Content Server from the end user client IP and not the SAP server IP

How can we configure SAP to have all communication going thru SAP server so the end user client doesn't need to communicate with the HTTP Content Server directly? (simpler firewall rules) 

We tried configure OAA3, OAG4,OAG1 and OAC0 but no luck. 
Please advise. 

OAC0 setting: 

Document Area: ArchiveLink
Storage type: HTTP Content Server

Document Area: ArchiveLink
Storage type: HTTP Content Server

entry.title: Re: RD04 Output stuck - no AP created
entry.content: hi, were you able to resolve this issue? facing the same issue

entry.title: Re: Simulate sales order using I_SalesOrderTP
entry.content:
Hello @SI_SG 

n SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the I_SalesOrderTP business object does not support simulation or test run. It’s used for actual transactional processing, and rollback isn’t allowed in behaviour classes.

If you need a simulation (e.g., pricing or availability checks without saving the order), use the simulateSalesOrder API from SAP API Hub instead. It’s designed specifically for this purpose and works without persisting data.

Thank you, and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: How to display RF Message in a separate Screen - RF Screens with Touch Enablement
entry.content:
Hello Daniil,

Unfortunately the Function code addition as RF Pushbutton only works when message display is set as' Pop up' Try adding the function code as Push button in presentation profile /SCMW/PRDVC and SAP will now allow to add.

entry.title: Re: Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students & lecturers
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: How to find the custom ABAP artifacts in the SAP system using the SAP tables.
entry.content: Please use the code box and add a little more text what this is and what its useful for.

entry.title: Mass stock relocation in warehouse without creating individual warehouse tasks
entry.content:
We need to:

  • Create new storage types and storage bins
  • Physically move articles to new storage locations
  • During the relocation, we will record article numbers, quantities, base unit of measure, current storage bins, and the new storage bins in an Excel spreadsheet.

Please provide:

  • Applicable apps or tools
  • Documentation or how-to steps

Our requirement: We want to avoid creating a warehouse task for each material individually.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass stock relocation in warehouse without creating i...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

To manage the creation of new storage types and bins, and the relocation of articles in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502, follow these steps:

Applicable Apps and Tools

Create Storage Bins

  • Create Storage Bins App: Warehouse Management - Create Storage Bins This app allows you to create storage bins within your warehouse structure. You can specify the warehouse, assign a storage type, and define attributes for each bin.
  • Mass Create Storage Bins App: Warehouse Management - Mass Create Storage Bins This app enables you to create, edit, or delete multiple storage bins simultaneously based on predefined storage bin structures.

Product Master Data

  1. Manage Product Master Data App: You can use the Manage Product Master Data app (Fiori ID: F1602) to search, display, edit, create, and copy master data for products effectively and quickly. It ensures that the master data displayed is always consistent.

Documentation and How-To Steps

Creating Storage Types and Bins

  1. Create Storage Types:

    • Navigate to the configuration environment and use the search function to open the activity ‘Create Storage Types Using Templates’.

  2. Create Storage Bins:

    • Use the ‘Create Storage Bins’ app to specify the warehouse and assign a storage type.
    • Define the location of the storage bin, such as aisle, stack, and coordinates.

  3. Mass Create Storage Bins:

    • Use the ‘Mass Create Storage Bins’ app to simulate and create storage bins for a predefined structure.
    • This app allows you to handle multiple bins efficiently without creating individual tasks for each material.

Relocating Articles

  • Record article numbers, quantities, base unit of measure, current storage bins, and new storage bins in an Excel spreadsheet.
  • Use the ‘Internal Movements’ functionality to move products to different storage bins without creating individual warehouse tasks for each material.

Guidance for Handling Relocation

  • Internal Movements: Warehouse Management - Internal Movements This feature includes replenishment, rearrangement, ad hoc movements, and posting changes. It allows for efficient management of warehouse space and order fill efficiency.

  • Avoiding Individual Warehouse Tasks: By using internal movements and mass creation tools, you can handle multiple items collectively, reducing the need for individual tasks.

 

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: SAP Developer News June 19th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

PODCAST: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/06/19/sap-developer-news-june-19th-2025/ 

SEA CodeJam roadshow promotion 

  • Singapore – ABAP Cloud  https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-codejam-abap-sap-btp-abap-environment-amp-rap-singapore/ev-p/14112313  
  • Singapore – SAP GenAI - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core-singapore/ev-p/14112295  
  • Kuala Lumpur – SAP Build - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-build-create-apps-processes-and-sites-without-code-kuala-lumpur/ev-p/14112261  
  • Bangkok – SAP GenAI - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core-bangkok-thailand/ev-p/14112276  

 

SAP Open Source Webinar – Start your Architecture Journey with Open Sourced SAP Architecture Center 

  • Registration link: https://go4.events.sap.com/architecture-center/en_us/home.html 
  • SAP Architecture Learning Center: https://architecture.learning.sap.com/ 

 

SAP community contributions 

  • Mauricio Lauffer's blog post on SAP BTP runtimes https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-btp-runtimes-my-personal-considerations-and-preferences-on-cloud/ba-p/14129510  
  • Abdulbasit Gulsen’s blog post on cds-numberrange-plugin https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/a-cap-plugin-for-flexible-number-range-management-cds-numberrange-plugin/ba-p/14129453  
  • The cds-numberrange-plugin repo on GitHub https://github.com/abdulbasitg/cds-numberrange-plugin 
  • The cds-numberrange-plugin entry on Best of cap-js https://bestofcapjs.org/#/packages/cds-numberrange-plugin  

 

SAPUI5 version preview in SAP Build Work Zone 

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/introducing-sapui5-version-preview-in-sap-build-work-zone/ba-p/14117996 

 

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 SEA CodeJam roadshow promotion 

0:58 SAP Open Source Webinar 

1:58 SAP community contributions 

3:58 SAPUI5 version preview in SAP Build Work Zone 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for June the 19th, 2025.  

[M K Sheena] Hello, everyone. We have an exciting news for the SAP developer community in Southeast Asia. The SAP Code Sam Roadshow is coming your way this July with stops in Singapore, Malaysia, and Thailand from July 2nd to July 9th. Shilfa, Srini, and I are gearing up to deliver full-day hands-on sessions on your favorite BTP topics. Here is the agenda. July 2nd and July 3rd, we'll be in Singapore and we'll cover ABAP Cloud and SAP Gen AI. July 7th, we'll meet in Kuala Lumpur to focus on SAP Build. And finally, on July 9th, we'll be in Bangkok to explore SAP Gen AI again. The registrations will be closed shortly, so don't miss this chance to participate in this exciting event. Stay tuned and get ready to learn with us.  

[Mamikee] Mark your calendars, on July 9th, SAP is hosting a special open source webinar to kick off your journey with the brand new open source SAP Architecture Center. Built on GitHub and design for architects and developers alike, the Architecture Center is your hub for solution reference diagrams, component lists, and real-world SAP BTP scenarios, all aimed at helping you design efficient, scalable enterprise landscapes. You'll hear from SAP product managers who will walk you through how this platform evolves from last year's BTP solution diagrams to today's collaborative architectural ecosystem. system now fully open source now whether you are building clean core extensions or mapping out full stack SAP solutions this is your chance to connect learn and contribute you can learn more about this event on in the description below. 

[DJ] wanted to just highlight a couple of recent SAP community contributions first there's a great blog post from Mauricio Lauffer all about BTP runtimes it's a very readable post written by a human being with opinions opinions that are clearly one from experience and maybe a few battle scars as well we learn from each other and especially when opinions are expressed and explained and when Mauricio expresses opinions i listen he covers runtimes languages performance scalability developer experience devops and lots more and ends with his own top picks which are in his words direct and unapologetic that is what i like anyway head over to the blog post and have a read over coffee even better let Mauricio know what your thoughts are in a comment we also have a new CAP plugin contribution by Abdul Basit ghulzan and it's called cds number range plugin and as the name suggests it allows you to easily add ranges to your cap apps and services if you're familiar with number ranges in the app stack then this will be very familiar to you as well basically you can define your own number ranges and then use annotations to define the fields to decorate the fields the elements that you want these number ranges to be valid for anyway as Mike Zashka said in a comment this plugin elevates number ranges to first class citizens that's a really nice way of thinking about it anyway head over to Abdelbasid's blog post, his GitHub repo, and also thanks to Marian Seiss, Best of JS, where it's also featured. See you online.  

[Nico] Hi, everyone, and welcome to the SAP Developer News. There's an exciting new feature in SAP Build Work Zone that lets you preview the latest UI5 version before it hits your productive system. You can now duplicate your site, enable the latest UI5 version for that site, and then test it, check it out, make sure it works as expected before you actually use it in production. This new feature is in response to customer feedback, so thank you very much. It's always very much appreciated. Thank you. Now, go check out that new feature, and I hope to talk to you soon. Bye.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Cloud Public - Cash Flow Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello @rekafulop 

Here’s how Cash Flow Reconciliation works in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, with a specific reference

On your screenshot

  • Unreconciled Bank Statement Flows: 0 EUR means no bank statement lines have been imported yet.
  • On the right, your forecasted flows (memo records) are present, but nothing can be matched until a bank flow exists

steps

Import a bank statement or manual bank flows:

  • Use apps like Manage Incoming Payment Files.

This will generate bank statement flows, which show up on the left side.

Once both forecasted flow and bank flow exist, the system allows reconciliation via the Reconcile Cash Flows app

 SAP Reference

  • SAP Help — Reconcile Cash Flows: “Choose a bank account with status Unreconciled to see items of bank statement flows and forecasted flows”

Let me know it works

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Unable to download course files in link on Exploring...
entry.content:
Hi @oskarkallstrom 

As per my understanding, your issue is happening within SAP Learning Hub. If so, you might need to contact their support. The available channels can be found at the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2404504:

  • To get help for the SAP Training Center or SAP Learning Hub, use  Visit the Help Center or Get Technical Help where you can find a ticketing system to request support with the Training/Learning Hub. You can also contact the SAP Training Center or SAP Learning Hub teams via the Contact details at the bottom of the page.

Best regards,

entry.title: Urgente problemas para acceder a mi suscripción SAP Learning Hub
entry.content:
Hola, 

Tengo que renovar mi certificación de SAP s/4HANA FI y el plazo cumple mañana 20-06-2025. He abierto un caso (id caso 5000176126) con mi problema pero las respuestas tardan mucho en llegar y no me han solucionado el problema. Cuando ingresa en el apartado Mis Certificaciones, aparece mi certificación que vence el próximo día 20-06-2025 y le pico al botón de mantener la certificación y aparece que no tengo ninguna suscripción, cuando no es el caso porque yo realizó el pago para acceder a todo el contenido de aprendizaje y para poder realizar la evaluación para mantener la certificación. No quiero volver a hacer la certificación completa, cuando el problema es técnico de SAP. Por favor necesito solucionar este tema cuanto antes.

Muchas gracias,

Saludos

entry.title: Issue submitting a Service Catalog Request
entry.content:
Anyone else having issues with accessing SPM Catalog mentioned in this article? I am not seeing SPM in the list of options.
 
3302846 - Incentive Management: How-To Submit a Service Catalog Request
https://me.sap.com/notes/3302846
 
SAP SuccessFactors Agent Performance Management

entry.title: Can CDP be implemented without enabling any AI features?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm looking to implement the Career Dev Planning module, but without activating any AI-related functionalities. The idea is to start with a manual setup: development goals created and managed by users, without automation or AI involvement. 

Is it possible to enable and use CDP in this way, without AI being a mandatory requirement?

Later on we might explore AI features, ut for now we'd like to move forward with a basic, non-AI version.

 

Any guidance or documentation would be much appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Commerce OCC: Max field size exceeded
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Please check the below mentioned KBA

https://me.sap.com/notes/3427848/E

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Multidimensional Analysis a Stepstone to modern Reporting in S/4HANA CE2502
entry.content:
Hi @Stefan-Kraus ,

It's great to see how embedded analytics is evolving and how UI5 and SAC technologies are continuing to merge. With all the hype surrounding Datasphere and Business Data Cloud, S4 Embedded Analytics has not been the focus of attention for quite some time. I have two quick questions for you:
1. Is there already a target release date for Private Cloud and on-premise, when this technology will be available (at the moment it is only available for Public Cloud, right)?
2. Is it possible to define jump targets (e.g., via CDS annotation) to transactional Fiori apps from multidimensional reporting in order to jump there from an analytical context?

Best regards,
David

entry.title: Re: Read data from the APP screen for editable fields wit...
entry.content:
In this video you have solution 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SxTOqw2Dcow

entry.title: Re: Where do I find SuccessFactors Learning Admin job aid...
entry.content:
Hi @Brenda_Jennings 

In top of what my colleague already shared, there are also some useful resources at the community Training & Expert Accreditation (SFX) | SAP SuccessFactors community.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Asset accounting - tax valuation area
entry.content:
Do you mean S/4Hana Public Cloud Edition, or Private Cloud. 

In Public Cloud there is no chance for you to create a custom area, depreciation areas are deployed based on accounts principle assignment. When the local accounts principle is assigned at company code level areas 01 and 15 are typically delivered, but this is dependent on what is delivered for that country, say for France, area 01, 15 and 92 are delivered, along with derived area 93.

If local accounts principle is assigned at ledger level, only area 01 is delivered.

entry.title: Re: Batch replication stuck in SMQ2
entry.content:
Hello,

Please make sure that the option "2 - Joint Update of Batch and Classif. with Retry in Error Case" (IMG --> EWM --> Interfaces --> ERP Integration for Decentral EWM --> Set Control Parameters for ERP Version Control )  is set in the configuration for the connected ERP system

From S/4 HANA 2020, SAP EWM supports local batch creation and its replication to S4.

Reference: 2987398 - Batch Replication from EWM in S/4 Decentral

br

Shailesh

entry.title: Re: Description Area associated with the Japanese propert...
entry.content:
Area 90 is assigned to valuation view 0JP_0090, which is assigned to valuation type JP00. 

Does this answer your question?

entry.title: Re: How to Resolve Issues Transporting Flavors - S/4HANA...
entry.content: ChatGPT or AI in general can be a good resource to answer questions, but some statements like "not all UI elements or fields may be included or correctly transported if they are not part of the assignment category" or "If this is misconfigured, fields may appear missing because the flavor is not fully applied" don't make sense. Follow what vananko wrote to understand a likely reason for the problem.

entry.title: Re: Build composition tree with ABAP CDS views
entry.content: I was exactly thinking of creating something of this sort but was not sure if the child at level 1 can have another composition and then how to handle it. But your blog clarified my idea. I was able to write my small test application. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Inventory Opening Balance DTW to be imported as DRAFT
entry.content:
Hi @dausto ,

Instead of using DTW, you can try copying the data directly from Excel into the system. Just make the necessary UI adjustments in Form Settings, then paste and save it as a draft.

Give it a try and let me know if it works for you!

entry.title: Re: Scripting Error in WebGUI for HTML
entry.content: This could be something related to the kernel release / patch level. Sounds like something may be wrong with ITS. Scripts certainly do work in webgui, not just SE. If you get such an error with any script, then there should be some error(s) in the browser console with more info about the problem.

entry.title: Re: Handle numeric fields - SAP Screen Personas 3.0
entry.content: The 'numerical' property is only supported when using Slipstream Engine. In SE it prevents non-numerical input but unfortunately, this is not the case in webgui.

entry.title: Re: Handle numeric fields - SAP Screen Personas 3.0
entry.content: Hello Tamas, taking advantage of your answer... SAP recommends use SE even if there is not mobile devices involved? I'am asking because there is a process on my company (we are migrating Guixt to SAP Personas) where we need to access local files directly. Could it work with SE? because we are facing issues doing it with webgui and it seems there is not workaround.

entry.title: Re: How to Resolve Issues Transporting Flavors - S/4HANA...
entry.content: Once again, some misleading, inconsistent and simply wrong information in this AI-generated reply. A lot of it doesn't even apply to Personas or classic apps in public cloud. Please don't pass on responses by ChatGPT as your own, without verifying its correctness.

entry.title: Re: Handle numeric fields - SAP Screen Personas 3.0
entry.content: SE's main target are mobile devices, but it works fine on non-mobile devices as well. There is no 100% feature parity with webgui, but that is not the intention anyway. Most features will work the same, with rare occasional differences dictated by technical reasons. Accessing local files is certainly possible when using SE. I wonder what issues you have in webgui with this.
